title: senna truncata
intro: Senna truncata, also known as Cape senna, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna truncata include relief from digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), and it may also help to reduce inflammation and improve skin health. Senna truncata can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tablet, or it can be added to herbal infusions to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
